data.title: Polygon is targeting 100,000 TPS by 2026
data.description:
Polygon has announced that it is targeting 100,000 transactions per second (TPS) in another significant move, as its POL token gets listed on the Solana platform. The new CEO of Polygon Foundation, Sandeep Naiwal, shared this in a roadmap on X. According to Nailwal, the roadmap is already in motion, with the first release on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/polygon-is-targeting-100000-tps-by-2026/

data.title: Europe hits Russia with new tariffs to hurt its war finances
data.description:
EU countries gave the nod to additional tariffs on fertilizers and other agricultural goods from Russia and its ally Belarus to cut Moscow’s cash amid the raging war in Ukraine. The new duties are targeting products unaffected by previous punitive trade measures. They also aim to reduce the bloc’s dependence on Russian imports, seen as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/europe-hits-russia-with-new-tariffs-to-hurt-its-war-finances/

data.title: Crypto Expert Puts Ethereum Price At $19,500 With Head And Shoulders Emergence
data.description:
Ethereum reclaimed a significant technical level in the latest 24-hour trading session, with its price crossing above the $2,800 mark and briefly touching $2,870. This interesting cross makes it the first time since February 2025 that Ethereum has traded above the $2,800 threshold. The move comes amid rising bullish momentum flowing out from Bitcoin, and according to recent analysis from a crypto expert, this could be just the beginning of a much larger rally for Ethereum. Technical Pattern Says Ethereum Could Be Close To $20,000 An interesting technical formation on Ethereum has now caught the attention of some traders: a classic inverse Head and Shoulders bottom
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-19500-with-hs-pattern/
